prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document provides financial data specifically related to capital expenditure and receipts from local authorities, which is under the jurisdiction of local government in England. The statistics presented and the references to local authority frameworks indicate that this release is applicable to England.
